# henlejonah.github.io
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Jonah Henle — Mechanical Engineering</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Sans:ital,opsz,wght@0,9..40,300;0,9..40,400;0,9..40,500;0,9..40,600;1,9..40,300&family=DM+Serif+Display:ital@0;1&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

:root {
  --white: #ffffff;
  --bg: #f5f5f7;
  --surface: #ffffff;
  --nav-bg: rgba(255,255,255,0.82);
  --text-primary: #1d1d1f;
  --text-secondary: #6e6e73;
  --text-tertiary: #aeaeb2;
  --blue: #0071e3;
  --blue-hover: #0077ed;
  --border: rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
  --border-strong: rgba(0,0,0,0.14);
  --shadow-sm: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
  --shadow-md: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
  --shadow-lg: 0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.16);
  --radius: 18px;
  --radius-sm: 10px;
  --font-body: 'DM Sans', -apple-system, sans-serif;
  --font-display: 'DM Serif Display', Georgia, serif;
}

html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

body {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  background: var(--bg);
  color: var(--text-primary);
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  overflow-x: hidden;
}

/* NAV */
nav {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  z-index: 900;
  height: 52px;
  background: var(--nav-bg);
  backdrop-filter: saturate(180%) blur(20px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: saturate(180%) blur(20px);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 0 2.5rem;
}

.nav-brand {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--text-primary);
  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
}

.nav-links {
  display: flex;
  gap: 2.2rem;
  list-style: none;
}

.nav-links a {
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 400;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  text-decoration: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: color 0.2s;
  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
}

.nav-links a:hover { color: var(--text-primary); }
.nav-links a.active { color: var(--blue); }

/* PAGE SYSTEM */
.page { display: none; min-height: 100vh; padding-top: 52px; }
.page.active { display: block; }

/* HERO */
#home { background: var(--white); }

.hero {
  max-width: 980px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 7rem 2rem 5rem;
  text-align: center;
}

.hero-eyebrow {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--blue);
  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
}

.hero-title {
  font-family: var(--font-display);
  font-size: clamp(3.2rem, 7vw, 6rem);
  line-height: 1.02;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  color: var(--text-primary);
  margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
}

.hero-title em {
  font-style: italic;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
}

.hero-sub {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 300;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  line-height: 1.65;
  max-width: 560px;
  margin: 0 auto 2.5rem;
  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
}

.hero-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.8rem;
  justify-content: center;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.btn {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  padding: 0.75rem 1.6rem;
  border-radius: 980px;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  text-decoration: none;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  transition: all 0.2s ease;
  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
}

.btn-filled { background: var(--blue); color: white; }
.btn-filled:hover { background: var(--blue-hover); transform: scale(1.02); }
.btn-outlined { background: transparent; color: var(--blue); border: 1.5px solid var(--blue); }
.btn-outlined:hover { background: rgba(0,113,227,0.06); transform: scale(1.02); }

.stats-strip {
  max-width: 980px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 1px;
  background: var(--border);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.stat-cell {
  background: var(--white);
  padding: 2rem 1.5rem;
  text-align: center;
}

.stat-cell .num {
  font-family: var(--font-display);
  font-size: 2.8rem;
  line-height: 1;
  color: var(--text-primary);
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}

.stat-cell .lbl {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  font-weight: 400;
}

.feature-section {
  max-width: 980px;
  margin: 4rem auto;
  padding: 0 2rem;
}

.feature-tiles {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 1.2rem;
}

.feature-tile {
  background: var(--surface);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  padding: 2.5rem 2.2rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: box-shadow 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
}

.feature-tile:hover { box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); transform: translateY(-3px); }

.tile-eyebrow {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--blue);
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}

.tile-title {
  font-family: var(--font-display);
  font-size: 1.7rem;
  line-height: 1.1;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}

.tile-desc {
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  font-weight: 300;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.tile-link {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.3rem;
  margin-top: 1.2rem;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--blue);
  cursor: pointer;
}

.tile-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

/* ABOUT */
#about { background: var(--white); }

.about-hero {
  max-width: 980px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 6rem 2rem 4rem;
  text-align: center;
}

.about-hero h1 {
  font-family: var(--font-display);
  font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 6vw, 5rem);
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  line-height: 1.05;
  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
}

.about-hero p {
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  font-weight: 300;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  max-width: 520px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  line-height: 1.7;
}

.about-grid {
  max-width: 980px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 2rem 2rem 5rem;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.6fr;
  gap: 3rem;
  align-items: start;
}

.about-photo-wrap { position: sticky; top: 72px; }

.about-photo {
  width: 100%;
  aspect-ratio: 3/4;
  background: var(--bg);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  overflow: hidden;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  color: var(--text-tertiary);
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  position: relative;
}

.about-photo img {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: none;
}

.photo-placeholder {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  z-index: 1;
}

.photo-placeholder span { font-size: 2.5rem; }

.about-section {
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
  padding-bottom: 3rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.about-section:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

.section-label {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.07em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--text-tertiary);
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.about-section h2 {
  font-family: var(--font-display);
  font-size: 2rem;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.15;
}

.about-section p {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  font-weight: 300;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  line-height: 1.75;
  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
}

.about-section p strong { color: var(--text-primary); font-weight: 500; }

.skills-list {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.skill-pill {
  background: var(--bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  padding: 0.7rem 1rem;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: var(--text-primary);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
}

.skill-pill::before {
  content: '';
  width: 6px; height: 6px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--blue);
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.edu-card {
  background: var(--bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  padding: 1.5rem 1.6rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 1.2rem;
}

.edu-icon {
  width: 44px; height: 44px;
  background: var(--blue);
  border-radius: 10px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.edu-degree { font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; margin-bottom: 0.2rem; }
.edu-school { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--text-secondary); }
.edu-dates { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-tertiary); margin-top: 0.2rem; }

/* PROJECTS */
#projects { background: var(--bg); }

.projects-hero {
  max-width: 980px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 6rem 2rem 3rem;
}

.projects-hero h1 {
  font-family: var(--font-display);
  font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 6vw, 5rem);
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  line-height: 1.05;
  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
}

.projects-hero p {
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 300;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  max-width: 480px;
}

.projects-grid {
  max-width: 980px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 2rem 6rem;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 1.2rem;
}

.proj-card {
  background: var(--surface);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  overflow: hidden;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: box-shadow 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.proj-card:hover { box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); transform: translateY(-4px); }

.proj-img-wrap {
  width: 100%;
  aspect-ratio: 16/9;
  background: var(--bg);
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.proj-img-wrap img {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  width: 100%; height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: none;
}

.proj-img-placeholder {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  color: var(--text-tertiary);
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 1;
}

.proj-img-placeholder .big { font-size: 2.8rem; }

.proj-img-overlay {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  opacity: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.25s;
  z-index: 2;
}

.proj-card:hover .proj-img-overlay { opacity: 1; }

.proj-img-overlay span {
  color: white;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
  padding: 0.4rem 0.9rem;
  border-radius: 20px;
}

.proj-body {
  padding: 1.5rem 1.6rem 1.8rem;
  flex: 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.proj-category {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--blue);
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}

.proj-name {
  font-family: var(--font-display);
  font-size: 1.4rem;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  line-height: 1.15;
  color: var(--text-primary);
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}

.proj-excerpt {
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 300;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  line-height: 1.6;
  flex: 1;
  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
}

.proj-chips { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.4rem; }

.proj-chip {
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  background: var(--bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 0.2rem 0.55rem;
}

/* MODAL */
.modal-backdrop {
  display: none;
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 1000;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  align-items: flex-end;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 0 1rem;
}

.modal-backdrop.open {
  display: flex;
  animation: backdropIn 0.25s ease;
}

@keyframes backdropIn { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } }

.modal-sheet {
  background: var(--white);
  border-radius: 20px 20px 0 0;
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 760px;
  max-height: 90vh;
  overflow-y: auto;
  animation: sheetUp 0.38s cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1);
  position: relative;
}

@keyframes sheetUp {
  from { transform: translateY(100%); opacity: 0; }
  to { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; }
}

.modal-topbar {
  position: sticky;
  top: 0; z-index: 10;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92);
  backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
  padding: 1rem 1.5rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.modal-topbar-title {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
}

.modal-close-btn {
  width: 28px; height: 28px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--bg);
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  transition: background 0.2s;
}

.modal-close-btn:hover { background: var(--border-strong); }

.modal-img-area {
  width: 100%;
  aspect-ratio: 16/9;
  background: var(--bg);
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.8rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.modal-img-area img {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  width: 100%; height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: none;
}

.modal-img-placeholder {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  color: var(--text-tertiary);
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  z-index: 1;
}

.modal-img-placeholder .big { font-size: 3.5rem; }

.upload-btn {
  font-family: var(--font-body);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--blue);
  background: rgba(0,113,227,0.08);
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(0,113,227,0.2);
  border-radius: 30px;
  padding: 0.45rem 1.1rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  z-index: 2;
}

.upload-btn:hover { background: rgba(0,113,227,0.14); }
.upload-btn input[type=file] { display: none; }

.modal-cover-change {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0.8rem;
  right: 0.8rem;
  z-index: 3;
}

.modal-content { padding: 2rem 2.2rem 3rem; }

.modal-cat {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--blue);
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

.modal-title {
  font-family: var(--font-display);
  font-size: 2.1rem;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  line-height: 1.1;
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}

.modal-sub {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 300;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  line-height: 1.5;
}

.modal-section-head {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.07em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--text-tertiary);
  margin-bottom: 0.7rem;
  margin-top: 1.8rem;
}

.modal-text {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 300;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  line-height: 1.75;
}

.modal-outcomes { list-style: none; }

.modal-outcomes li {
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  font-weight: 300;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  line-height: 1.6;
  padding: 0.65rem 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 0.8rem;
}

.modal-outcomes li::before {
  content: '✓';
  color: var(--blue);
  font-weight: 600;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.modal-tools { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem; margin-top: 0.5rem; }

.modal-tool-chip {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--blue);
  background: rgba(0,113,227,0.08);
  border: 1px solid rgba(0,113,227,0.2);
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 0.3rem 0.75rem;
}

/* Gallery */
.modal-gallery {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 0.6rem;
  margin-top: 0.7rem;
}

.gallery-thumb {
  aspect-ratio: 1;
  border-radius: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: var(--bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  position: relative;
}

.gallery-thumb img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; display: block; }

.gallery-thumb .remove-img {
  position: absolute;
  top: 4px; right: 4px;
  width: 22px; height: 22px;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.55);
  border: none;
  border-radius: 50%;
  color: white;
  font-size: 0.65rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  display: none;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

.gallery-thumb:hover .remove-img { display: flex; }

.gallery-add {
  aspect-ratio: 1;
  border-radius: 10px;
  border: 1.5px dashed var(--border-strong);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.3rem;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  color: var(--text-tertiary);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  position: relative;
}

.gallery-add:hover { border-color: var(--blue); color: var(--blue); background: rgba(0,113,227,0.04); }
.gallery-add input[type=file] { display: none; }

/* FOOTER */
footer {
  background: var(--white);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 2rem;
}

.footer-inner {
  max-width: 980px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 1rem;
}

.footer-copy { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text-tertiary); }

.footer-links { display: flex; gap: 1.8rem; }

.footer-links a {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: color 0.2s;
}

.footer-links a:hover { color: var(--blue); }

/* ANIMATIONS */
.fade-up {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(24px);
  animation: fadeUp 0.65s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) forwards;
}

@keyframes fadeUp { to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

.fade-up:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.05s; }
.fade-up:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.13s; }
.fade-up:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.21s; }
.fade-up:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.29s; }
.fade-up:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.37s; }
.fade-up:nth-child(6) { animation-delay: 0.45s; }

/* RESPONSIVE */
@media (max-width: 700px) {
  nav { padding: 0 1.2rem; }
  .hero { padding: 5rem 1.2rem 3rem; }
  .stats-strip { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
  .feature-tiles, .projects-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .about-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .about-photo-wrap { position: static; }
  .modal-gallery { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <div class="nav-brand">Jonah Henle</div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a onclick="goTo('home')" id="nav-home" class="active">Home</a></li>
    <li><a onclick="goTo('about')" id="nav-about">About</a></li>
    <li><a onclick="goTo('projects')" id="nav-projects">Projects</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- HOME -->
<div class="page active" id="home">
  <div class="hero">
    <p class="hero-eyebrow fade-up">Mechanical Engineering · Concordia University</p>
    <h1 class="hero-title fade-up">Designing things<br><em>that actually work.</em></h1>
    <p class="hero-sub fade-up">A hands-on engineering student with a passion for building things that work — from all disciplines</p>
    <div class="hero-actions fade-up">
      <button class="btn btn-filled" onclick="goTo('projects')">View Projects</button>
      <button class="btn btn-outlined" onclick="goTo('about')">About Me</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="stats-strip">
    <div class="stat-cell fade-up"><div class="num">6</div><div class="lbl">Engineering Projects</div></div>
    <div class="stat-cell fade-up"><div class="num">3.75</div><div class="lbl">GPA</div></div>
    <div class="stat-cell fade-up"><div class="num">1</div><div class="lbl">Completed Internship</div></div>
    <div class="stat-cell fade-up"><div class="num">'28</div><div class="lbl">Graduation</div></div>
  </div>

  <div class="feature-section">
    <div class="feature-tiles">
      <div class="feature-tile fade-up" onclick="goTo('projects')">
        <div class="tile-eyebrow">Portfolio</div>
        <div class="tile-title">Engineering Projects</div>
        <p class="tile-desc">From robotic arms to heat exchangers — six projects spanning design, simulation, and fabrication.</p>
        <div class="tile-link">Explore projects →</div>
      </div>
      <div class="feature-tile fade-up" onclick="goTo('about')">
        <div class="tile-eyebrow">Background</div>
        <div class="tile-title">About Me</div>
        <p class="tile-desc">Skills, education, and the story behind my passion for mechanical engineering and sustainable design.</p>
        <div class="tile-link">Learn more →</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<div class="page" id="about">
  <div class="about-hero">
    <h1 class="fade-up">About Me.</h1>
    <p class="fade-up">Engineer Student, Designer, and problem-solver based in Montreal.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="about-grid">
    <div class="about-photo-wrap fade-up">
      <div class="about-photo" id="about-photo-box">
        <div class="photo-placeholder" id="about-placeholder" style="display:none">
          <span>👤</span>
          <span style="font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--text-tertiary)">Add your photo</span>
        </div>
        <img id="about-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="display:block" alt="Profile photo">
      </div>

    </div>

    <div class="about-body">
      <div class="about-section fade-up">
        <div class="section-label">Introduction</div>
        <h2>Hi, I'm Jonah.</h2>
        <p>I'm a <strong>second-year Mechanical Engineering student</strong> at Concordia University. I'm drawn to problems at the intersection of design, physics, and manufacturing — how something looks, how it works, and how you actually build it.</p>
        <p>My work spans electronics and PCB design, mechatronics, modeling, manufacturing and programming — I enjoy tackling projects that require skills from multiple disciplines.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="about-section fade-up">
        <div class="section-label">Technical Skills</div>
        <h2>What I know.</h2>
        <div class="skills-list">
          <div class="skill-pill">SolidWorks / CATIA</div>
          <div class="skill-pill">MATLAB / Simulink</div>
          <div class="skill-pill">DipTrace / Multisim / Falstad</div>
          <div class="skill-pill">GD&T / Tolerancing</div>
          <div class="skill-pill">CNC Machining</div>
          <div class="skill-pill">FDM 3D Printing</div>
          <div class="skill-pill">Arduino</div>
          <div class="skill-pill">Electronics & Manufacturing</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="about-section fade-up">
        <div class="section-label">Education</div>
        <h2>Where I study.</h2>
        <div class="edu-card">
          <div class="edu-icon">🎓</div>
          <div>
            <div class="edu-degree">B.Eng. Mechanical Engineering</div>
            <div class="edu-school">Concordia University — Faculty of Applied Science & Engineering</div>
            <div class="edu-dates">Concordia University · Montreal, QC</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="about-section fade-up">
        <div class="section-label">Experience</div>
        <h2>Where I've worked.</h2>
        <div class="edu-card">
          <div class="edu-icon">✈️</div>
          <div>
            <div class="edu-degree">Design Intern</div>
            <div class="edu-school">Bombardier — Montreal, QC</div>
            <div class="edu-dates">Previous internship · Aerospace & Transportation</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="about-section fade-up">
        <div class="section-label">Honours & Societies</div>
        <h2>Recognition.</h2>
        <div class="edu-card">
          <div class="edu-icon">🏅</div>
          <div>
            <div class="edu-degree">Member — Golden Key International Honour Society</div>
            <div class="edu-school">Concordia University Chapter</div>
            <div class="edu-dates">Invitation-only · Top 15% of students</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PROJECTS -->
<div class="page" id="projects">
  <div class="projects-hero">
    <h1 class="fade-up">Projects.</h1>
    <p class="fade-up">A selection of engineering work from coursework, competitions, and personal exploration.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="projects-grid" id="projects-grid"></div>
</div>

<!-- MODAL -->
<div class="modal-backdrop" id="modal-backdrop" onclick="closeOnBackdrop(event)">
  <div class="modal-sheet">
    <div class="modal-topbar">
      <div class="modal-topbar-title" id="modal-tb-title"></div>
      <button class="modal-close-btn" onclick="closeModal()">✕</button>
    </div>

    <div class="modal-img-area" id="modal-img-area">
      <img id="modal-hero-img" src="" alt="">
      <div class="modal-img-placeholder" id="modal-img-placeholder">
        <span class="big" id="modal-placeholder-icon"></span>
        <span>No cover photo yet</span>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-cover-change" style="display:none">
        <label class="upload-btn">
          📷 Set Cover Photo
          <input type="file" accept="image/*" onchange="setModalCover(event)">
        </label>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="modal-content" id="modal-content-area"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-inner">
    <div class="footer-copy">© 2025 Jonah Henle · Mechanical Engineering · Concordia University</div>
    <div class="footer-links">
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jonah-henle-a933a027a/" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
      <a href="/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#2a4b464f526a474b4346045f5e455845445e4504494b">Contact</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</footer>

<script data-cfasync="false" src="/cdn-cgi/scripts/5c5dd728/cloudflare-static/email-decode.min.js"></script><script>
const PROJECTS = [
  {
    id: 'p1', icon: '🔦',
    category: 'Opto-electronics',
    name: 'Laser Light Show',
    excerpt: 'Custom PCB, Arduino, and 3D-printed housing combine to project dynamic laser patterns controlled by three front-panel knobs.',
    tools: ['Arduino', 'SolidWorks', 'MATLAB', 'DipTrace', '3D Printing'],
    cover: 'data:image/png;base64,',
    gallery: ['data:image/png;base64,','data:image/png;base64,','data:image/png;base64,','data:image/png;base64,','data:image/png;base64,'],
    overview: 'The Laser Light Show combines CAD design, circuit design and assembly, and embedded programming into a single device. Three knobs on the front panel adjust the speed of three motors using pulse-width modulation (PWM), which changes the vibration of each motor and in turn alters the pattern of the reflected laser on the wall. The system was first simulated in MATLAB to validate the design.',
    details: 'The circuit was designed in DipTrace and driven by an Arduino Nano. Three potentiometers feed PWM signals to three independent motors — each motor\'s vibration deflects the laser in a unique pattern, and the combination of the three creates complex, evolving projections. The housing was modelled in SolidWorks and 3D printed. All circuit design, coding, manufacturing, and assembly were completed in-house.',
    outcomes: ['Full end-to-end build: PCB design, firmware, CAD, and 3D printing', 'MATLAB simulation used to predict and validate laser pattern behaviour', 'PWM motor control implemented from scratch on Arduino Nano', 'Custom DipTrace PCB with full schematic and layout']
  },
  {
    id: 'p2', icon: '🪑',
    category: 'Mechanical Design',
    name: 'Standing Desk',
    excerpt: 'Motorised sit-stand desk with dual linear actuators, a single-cable electrical setup, and a fully parametric SolidWorks design built for easy disassembly.',
    tools: ['SolidWorks', 'Linear Actuators', 'DC Power Supply', 'Sheet Metal'],
    cover: 'data:image/png;base64,',
    gallery: ['data:image/png;base64,'],
    overview: 'This standing desk was my first major solo project. The desk raises and lowers using a pair of 50-inch linear actuators mounted in a slider assembly. Both actuators are wired to a single momentary switch, allowing height adjustment anywhere within the full 50-inch range. All electrical components are fed from a single DC power supply — one cable to the wall outlet and it is ready to use.',
    details: 'Designed entirely in SolidWorks with disassembly in mind — all joints and connections can be taken apart without special tools. The actuator-in-slider arrangement keeps the mechanism compact inside the wooden leg profile. The wiring routes both actuators in parallel to a single momentary switch for simultaneous, synchronised movement.',
    outcomes: ['Full 50-inch height adjustment range via linear actuators', 'Single-cable power setup — plug in and use immediately', 'Designed for easy disassembly and reassembly', 'Complete assembly modelled in SolidWorks']
  },
  {
    id: 'p3', icon: '⚡',
    category: 'Electronics',
    name: 'DC Desktop Power Supply',
    excerpt: 'Bench power supply converting 120V AC to selectable DC outputs (3.3V, 5V, or 1.2–30V variable) — selected to present at the annual department fair.',
    tools: ['SolidWorks', 'DipTrace', 'Sheet Metal', 'PCB Design'],
    cover: 'data:image/png;base64,',
    gallery: ['data:image/png;base64,','data:image/png;base64,','data:image/png;base64,'],
    overview: 'This self-made bench power supply takes 120V AC from a standard wall outlet and converts it to DC. The user can select a fixed 3.3V or 5V output, or dial in any voltage from 1.2V to 30V using the variable output. All design, circuitry, and wiring were completed independently. The enclosure was fabricated from sheet metal. This project was selected to be presented at the annual department fair.',
    details: 'The front panel features a digital volt and ampere meter, a 3.3–5V toggle switch, a 10K potentiometer for the variable output, and four binding posts. The PCB was designed in DipTrace (Rev 5, dated 10/06/22). The chassis was modelled in SolidWorks and bent from sheet metal. The full circuit schematic covers rectification, regulation, and output switching.',
    outcomes: ['Variable output range: 1.2V to 30V via 10K potentiometer', 'Fixed 3.3V and 5V outputs with toggle switch', 'Digital volt and ampere meter on front panel', 'Selected to present at the annual department engineering fair']
  },
  {
    id: 'p4', icon: '🏎️',
    category: 'Mechatronics',
    name: 'RC Car Racing Simulator',
    excerpt: 'Full driving simulator with custom force-feedback steering wheel, self-built pedals, modular steel frame, and a live first-person camera feed from a modified RC car.',
    tools: ['CAD Design', 'Arduino', 'PID Controller', 'Wireless Comms', '3D Printing'],
    cover: 'data:image/png;base64,',
    gallery: ['data:image/png;base64,','data:image/png;base64,','data:image/png;base64,'],
    overview: 'This simulator lets a user wirelessly control an RC car from a true first-person driving perspective. The rig includes self-made pedals, a steering wheel with force feedback and self-centering via a PID controller, a modular steel frame, a monitor displaying the car\'s live camera feed, and an adjustable seat. The RC car was modified to carry a wireless camera module and accept steering and throttle inputs from the simulator.',
    details: 'The steering wheel assembly uses a motor-driven force feedback mechanism with a PID controller to simulate road resistance and provide self-centering. Pedal geometry was designed in CAD and fabricated for realistic feel. The modular steel frame allows reconfiguration and transport. The RC car was stripped and fitted with a wireless FPV camera and a custom receiver board to interpret the simulator inputs.',
    outcomes: ['Force feedback and self-centering steering via PID controller', 'Live first-person camera feed from modified RC car', 'Custom CAD-designed pedal assembly', 'Modular steel frame with adjustable seat position']
  },
  {
    id: 'p5', icon: '🔧',
    category: 'Manufacturing & Machining',
    name: 'Tool Kit Manufacturing',
    excerpt: 'Fully machined tool kit — hammer on a manual lathe, set square on manual and CNC mill, toolbox from sheet metal — all produced to engineering drawings.',
    tools: ['Manual Lathe', 'Manual Mill', 'CNC Mill', 'Fusion 360', 'SolidWorks', 'Sheet Metal'],
    cover: 'data:image/png;base64,',
    gallery: ['data:image/webp;base64,','data:image/png;base64,','data:image/png;base64,'],
    overview: 'A complete tool kit manufactured using a range of machining techniques as part of the MIAE 312 course at Concordia University. The kit includes a hammer turned on a manual lathe, a set square with a body milled on a manual mill and a face milled on a CNC mill using Fusion 360 toolpaths, and a toolbox fabricated from sheet metal.',
    details: 'The set square body was machined from 6061 T6 aluminium (1.5" × 0.5" flat bar stock, 3.5" long) to a surface roughness of √63. Tolerances held to ±0.005" on critical dimensions. The CNC face was programmed in Fusion 360. Engineering drawings were produced in SolidWorks to ASME standards with full GD&T annotations.',
    outcomes: ['Hammer produced on manual lathe to drawing tolerances', 'Set square body milled on manual mill from 6061 T6 aluminium', 'Set square face CNC-milled using Fusion 360 toolpaths', 'Toolbox fabricated from sheet metal with riveted joints']
  },
  {
    id: 'p6', icon: '📐',
    category: 'CAD & Design',
    name: 'Engineering Drawings & CAD',
    excerpt: 'A collection of engineering drawings and CAD models from coursework at Concordia University and John Abbott College — assemblies, section views, detail views, and GD&T part drawings.',
    tools: ['SolidWorks', 'AutoCAD', 'GD&T', 'Fusion 360'],
    cover: 'data:image/png;base64,',
    gallery: ['data:image/png;base64,','data:image/png;base64,','data:image/png;base64,','data:image/png;base64,'],
    overview: 'This is not a single project but an accumulation of CAD designs completed across various projects, assignments, and labs at Concordia University (MECH 211, MIAE 312) and John Abbott College. The collection demonstrates a broad range of drafting and modelling skills across multiple software platforms.',
    details: 'Work includes a 17-part power transmission assembly drawing with full BOM (MECH 211), a disc/pulley section view with Section A-A at 4:5 scale (John Abbott College, Winter 2022), a wheel assembly drawing with detail view and BOM (MECH 211), an axel support part drawing with GD&T dimensions (MECH 211), and an eye screw detail drawing (John Abbott College). All drawings follow standard engineering drafting conventions.',
    outcomes: ['Assembly drawings with full bills of materials', 'Section views and detail views to ASME drafting standards', 'GD&T dimensioned part drawings', 'Work from Concordia University (MECH 211, MIAE 312) and John Abbott College']
  }
];

// Image store (session memory)
const imgStore = {};
PROJECTS.forEach(p => { imgStore[p.id] = { cover: p.cover || null, gallery: p.gallery || [] }; });

let activeId = null;

// Build project grid cards
function buildGrid() {
  const grid = document.getElementById('projects-grid');
  grid.innerHTML = '';
  PROJECTS.forEach((p, i) => {
    const cover = imgStore[p.id].cover;
    const card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'proj-card fade-up';
    card.style.animationDelay = (i * 0.08) + 's';
    card.onclick = () => openModal(p.id);
    card.innerHTML = `
      <div class="proj-img-wrap">
        <img src="${cover||''}" style="${cover?'display:block':'display:none'}" alt="${p.name}">
        <div class="proj-img-placeholder" style="${cover?'display:none':''}">
          <span class="big">${p.icon}</span>
          <span>No photo yet</span>
        </div>
        <div class="proj-img-overlay"><span>View Project</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="proj-body">
        <div class="proj-category">${p.category}</div>
        <div class="proj-name">${p.name}</div>
        <p class="proj-excerpt">${p.excerpt}</p>
        <div class="proj-chips">${p.tools.map(t=>`<span class="proj-chip">${t}</span>`).join('')}</div>
      </div>`;
    grid.appendChild(card);
  });
}

function openModal(id) {
  activeId = id;
  const p = PROJECTS.find(x => x.id === id);
  const store = imgStore[id];

  document.getElementById('modal-tb-title').textContent = p.name;
  document.getElementById('modal-placeholder-icon').textContent = p.icon;

  const heroImg = document.getElementById('modal-hero-img');
  const ph = document.getElementById('modal-img-placeholder');
  if (store.cover) {
    heroImg.src = store.cover;
    heroImg.style.display = 'block';
    ph.style.display = 'none';
  } else {
    heroImg.style.display = 'none';
    ph.style.display = 'flex';
  }

  document.getElementById('modal-content-area').innerHTML = `
    <div class="modal-cat">${p.category}</div>
    <div class="modal-title">${p.name}</div>
    <p class="modal-sub">${p.excerpt}</p>

    <div class="modal-section-head">Overview</div>
    <p class="modal-text">${p.overview}</p>

    <div class="modal-section-head">Technical Details</div>
    <p class="modal-text">${p.details}</p>

    <div class="modal-section-head">Key Outcomes</div>
    <ul class="modal-outcomes">${p.outcomes.map(o=>`<li>${o}</li>`).join('')}</ul>

    <div class="modal-section-head">Tools & Methods</div>
    <div class="modal-tools">${p.tools.map(t=>`<span class="modal-tool-chip">${t}</span>`).join('')}</div>

    <div class="modal-section-head">Photos</div>
    <div class="modal-gallery" id="modal-gallery">${buildGalleryHTML(id)}</div>
  `;

  document.getElementById('modal-backdrop').classList.add('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
}

function buildGalleryHTML(id) {
  const store = imgStore[id];
  return store.gallery.map((src, i) => `
    <div class="gallery-thumb">
      <img src="${src}" alt="Photo ${i+1}">
    </div>
  `).join('');
}

function refreshGallery() {
  const el = document.getElementById('modal-gallery');
  if (el) el.innerHTML = buildGalleryHTML(activeId);
}

function addGalleryImages(e) {
  const files = Array.from(e.target.files);
  if (!files.length || !activeId) return;
  let done = 0;
  files.forEach(f => {
    const r = new FileReader();
    r.onload = ev => {
      imgStore[activeId].gallery.push(ev.target.result);
      if (++done === files.length) refreshGallery();
    };
    r.readAsDataURL(f);
  });
  e.target.value = '';
}

function removeGalleryImg(e, idx) {
  e.stopPropagation();
  imgStore[activeId].gallery.splice(idx, 1);
  refreshGallery();
}

function setModalCover(e) {
  const f = e.target.files[0];
  if (!f || !activeId) return;
  const r = new FileReader();
  r.onload = ev => {
    imgStore[activeId].cover = ev.target.result;
    const img = document.getElementById('modal-hero-img');
    img.src = ev.target.result;
    img.style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('modal-img-placeholder').style.display = 'none';
    buildGrid();
  };
  r.readAsDataURL(f);
  e.target.value = '';
}

function setAboutPhoto(e) {
  const f = e.target.files[0];
  if (!f) return;
  const r = new FileReader();
  r.onload = ev => {
    const img = document.getElementById('about-img');
    img.src = ev.target.result;
    img.style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('about-placeholder').style.display = 'none';
  };
  r.readAsDataURL(f);
}

function closeModal() {
  document.getElementById('modal-backdrop').classList.remove('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = '';
  activeId = null;
}

function closeOnBackdrop(e) {
  if (e.target === document.getElementById('modal-backdrop')) closeModal();
}

document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Escape') closeModal(); });

function goTo(id) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-links a').forEach(a => a.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('nav-' + id).classList.add('active');
  window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
  document.querySelectorAll('#' + id + ' .fade-up').forEach((el, i) => {
    el.style.animation = 'none';
    el.offsetHeight;
    el.style.animation = '';
    el.style.animationDelay = (i * 0.08) + 's';
  });
  if (id === 'projects') buildGrid();
}

buildGrid();
goTo('home');
</script>
</body>
</html>
